data.title: Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions Facilitates Sale of Lexus of Warwick in Rhode Island
data.description: In a recent transaction, Pinnacle Mergers & Acquisitions facilitated the acquisition of Lexus of Warwick from Penske Automotive Group on behalf of Rob McGee. As part of the McGee Automotive Family's expanding multi-state portfolio, the store will retain its name as Lexus of Warwick. This deal highlights Pinnacle's successful partnership with Rob McGee and signifies the continued growth of the McGee Automotive Family.

data.title: LiveOnNY Launches Targeted Public Service Campaign to Increase Organ Donor Registration Across New York
data.description: A new campaign was launched on New York Mets Opening Day, spreading statewide to tackle the existing gap between the demand for organ donations and the number of registered donors. LiveOnNY, the organ procurement organization for the New York metropolitan area, is leading the initiative. This campaign aims to increase organ donor registration numbers in New York State and address the critical need for donors. The campaign started on March 26, 2026, and will target a wide audience to promote awareness and encourage more individuals to register as organ donors. With the initiative expanding across the state, the goal is to significantly boost the number of registered organ donors in New York.

data.title: Everstar Announces Collaboration with DOE, National Laboratories, and Microsoft -- Marking Its First Major Milestone in the Genesis Mission
data.description: Everstar has revealed its partnership with the U.S. Department of Energy (DOE), Idaho National Laboratory (INL), Argonne National Laboratory (ANL), and Microsoft in connection with the DOE's Genesis Mission on March 26, 2026. This collaboration is set to be instrumental in Everstar's involvement in this key initiative.

data.title: Meta Stock Slides As Court Losses Bring 'Big Tobacco Moment' Comparisons
data.description: Shares of Meta plummeted as consecutive court defeats caused speculation likening the situation to social media's equivalent of the infamous "Big Tobacco moment." The decline in Meta stock was highlighted in a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: This AI Builder Is At A Pivotal Chart Level With Earnings Due
data.description: Argan experienced a significant growth surge primarily due to the rapid construction of data centers for artificial intelligence tasks. The company is currently at a crucial chart level, with earnings on the horizon.

data.title: ASML Stock Called 'Top Pick' As Memory-Chip Makers Upgrade Gear
data.description: An expert analyst recently labeled ASML stock as a "top pick," noting the semiconductor equipment leader's advantage from memory chip companies acquiring new equipment. This endorsement comes as memory-chip firms ramp up their gear upgrades. The favorable forecast boosts ASML's position in the market, positioning it as a promising investment opportunity.

data.title: Arm Holdings Stock Sees Relative Strength Rating Jump To 87
data.description: Arm Holdings' American Depository Receipt (ADR) has reached an impressive Relative Strength Rating exceeding 80, specifically hitting 87. This significant jump in the rating demonstrates strong performance for the stock in comparison to the broader market.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Vensure Employer Solutions/
data.description: Vensure Employer Solutions has raised a significant $450 million investment from Stone Point to boost their M&A and AI innovation efforts. This update was announced by the company on 23-Mar-2026.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls As Trump's War Comments Hit Stocks; Oil Surges (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline following President Trump's warning to Iran to prioritize progressing towards a peace agreement promptly. Concurrently, oil prices saw a significant increase. This occurrence signifies a noteworthy impact on the market, with the Dow falling as a result of Trump's remarks, paired with a surge in oil prices.

data.title: OptionMetrics Exhibiting at Future Alpha NY, Highlighting Role of Options Data in Assessing Alpha Opportunities
data.description: In New York, OptionMetrics, a top provider of historical options data and analytics globally, has announced its participation in the Future Alpha NY event from March 31 to April 1. The company is known for its comprehensive options data and analytics solutions.

data.title: MAGGIE BAIRD, SUPPORT+FEED AND WETA ANNOUNCE NEW PUBLIC MEDIA SERIES IN DEVELOPMENT: CLIMATE KITCHEN
data.description: The WETA Well Beings Initiative is broadening its programming by introducing a unique lifestyle cooking series hosted by Maggie Baird. This groundbreaking series focuses on promoting good food and providing a blueprint for sustainable living to contribute to a healthier planet. The initiative, in collaboration with Maggie Baird and WETA, aims to raise awareness about sustainable living practices through engaging food-related content. This first-of-its-kind series promises to deliver valuable insights on creating a healthier lifestyle while emphasizing the importance of environmentally-friendly choices. The initiative's expansion underscores a commitment to promoting well-being and sustainability.

data.title: American Global Strategies Launches AGS Ambassadors Program with PGA TOUR Champions Star Alex Cejka and Rising Collegiate Standout Gaven Lane
data.description: American Global Strategies LLC (AGS) unveiled their new AGS Ambassadors Program on March 26, 2026. This program aims to showcase top talent in the golf industry, aligning with AGS's core values of precision, professionalism, and global influence. The initiative will bring attention to skilled individuals who exemplify these qualities.

data.title: National Cancer Institute Awards Rosalind Franklin University Researcher Grant to Crack the Epigenetic Code of Pancreatic Cancer Muscle Wasting
data.description: In North Chicago, Illinois, on March 26, 2026, Rosalind Franklin University disclosed that Dr. Paige Arneson-Wissink, an assistant professor in the Center for Genetic Diseases specializing in biochemistry and molecular biology, has secured a substantial grant. The grant totals $747,000 and spans a duration of three years.

data.title: Blink Charging Stock Drops Ahead Of Its Q4 Earnings Report
data.description: Blink Charging Co (NASDAQ: BLNK) saw a significant drop in its shares today ahead of its upcoming fourth-quarter earnings report. Analysts anticipate the company will announce a loss of 11 cents per share with revenue expected to be around $28.56 million. This decline follows a strong third quarter for Blink where revenue rose by 7.3% to $27 million, and service revenue increased by 35.5% to $11.9 million mainly due to higher charger utilization and network fees. The company also reported a gross margin of 35.8% and reduced its operating cash burn by 87% to $2.2 million. Operating expenses decreased by 26% year-over-year, excluding one-time items. CEO Mike Battaglia is optimistic about the company's performance.

data.title: Nebius AI Cloud 3.5 Introduces Serverless AI to Give Developers Frictionless Compute for Real-World AI
data.description: In Amsterdam, Nebius has introduced Nebius AI Cloud 3.5, enhancing its comprehensive cloud platform. This release includes new features aimed at streamlining operations and enhancing the speed of prototyping, testing, and product deployment for AI developers. With the addition of serverless capabilities, developers can initiate workloads promptly without the extensive task of setting up infrastructure beforehand. This advancement allows AI teams to expedite their experiments, model training, and deployment processes.
